name: cart-checkout
summary: Ecommerce core: persisted cart store + products/orders/order_items tables + a place_order RPC that prices server-side (never trusts the client). Ties into payments.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_orders.sql (products public-read; orders own; place_order() prices from the DB)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Seed products, add to cart with useCart(), then placeOrder() — the server computes the total.
After place_order returns an order id, start payment (Stripe web / RevenueCat) and mark paid via your webhook.
Replace src/features/cart/ui/cart-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
